Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term momentum performers at the top of the ranking. REX ranks #1 with a score of 93.6, displaying balanced multi-timeframe strength across 1-year (+131.21%), 5-year (+291.28%), and 10-year (+465.18%) returns, while maintaining all four moving average supports and outperforming SPY by 107.73% over the past year. LINC shows even more extreme historical performance with a 2468.11% ten-year return and a stunning 2216.11% outperformance versus SPY over that period, though its 1-year return of 119.04% and momentum ratio of 0.93 for the 1y/6m period suggest deceleration in near-term momentum despite its exceptional long-term trajectory. Both tickers pass four of five momentum ratio thresholds and maintain positions above all major moving averages, indicating sustained uptrends, though REX's more consistent ratio progression (ranging 1.03 to 3.67) suggests steadier acceleration compared to LINC's volatility between periods. The data suggests these represent secular trend winners, with REX showing cleaner intermediate momentum while LINC exemplifies extreme but potentially decelerating long-term outperformance
